titleStmt.title: SII 8.349: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 349. (A.R. No. 72 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaliśvaran Ari Irāyavibhāṭan bhāṣai kkut tappuvarāyarakaṇḍan mūvarāyarakaṇḍan kaṇḍanāṭukoṇḍu koṇḍa nāṭukuṭā tāncatusamutrātipati śrīvirapradāpa devarāyamahārā yar pṛtuvirājyam paṇṇia ruḷāniṉṟa śakābtam 1000 3 100 5 10 2-n mel cellāniṉṟa sa vumiyavaruṣattu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ēkhādaśi yum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattuṉāḷ naṭuviṉmaṇḍa lattu Irājairājavaḷanāṭṭu tirumuṉaippāṭināṭṭu centamaṅkalamuṭaiyār Āvattukkāttaruḷiya nayinār koyiṟ tāṉattāṟkum Ivvūrk grāmadevadai yāṉa teṟkilvāca lil tukkātevi koyiṟ tāṉattāṟkum kuṭu tta Udakapūrvva tarmmaśāsana p paṭṭaiyam . nayiṉār Āvattukāttaruḷiya nayiṉār pūcai punaskāra m Aṅkaraṅkapokam Amutupaṭikkum tirununtāviḷakku pattukkum paṅkunimātattile cataiya
nakṣattra ttile tirutterile Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruṉāḷukkum de varāyama hāraāyar tarmamā ka kaṟasa ṅvaṟsa rattu Āṭimātam mutalukku vaḻutilampaṭṭu Ucāvaṭiyil kallaikuṟicci paṟṟil kallaikuṟicci Ūr Oṉṟukku melaipaṇṇai kiḻaipaṇṇai Uṭpaṭa kallaikuṟicci Ūr Oṉṟukku kuḷam poṉ 6 100 9 10 9 � kku sa vusti poṉ 5 100 4 10 Akṣara ttile Ūr Oṉṟukku kuḷam poṉ Aṟunūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟuoṉpatu �kku sa vusti poṉ Aiññūṟṟu nāṟpatu Ippoṉṉukku Inta Ūr ṉān kellai Uṭpaṭṭa teṉpāṟkellai puliūr Ellaikku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai ceṅkuṟicci Ellaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai pātūr centamaṅkalattil Ellaikku teṟku kaḷattūr Ellaikku meṟku Iṉṉāṉkellai Uṭpaṭa kallaikuṟicciyum tukkātevikku pūcai puṉaskā ram tiruppaṇikku ceṅkoṇṭān
paṟṟil Ārū r Oṉṟu Āka Inta Iraṇṭu Ūrum nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nattaṅkaḷ nañcai puñcai vān payir pun payir vilaiyācaiaṟuti vācalpaṇam veṭṭivari Erimīn ceṭṭuiṟai cekkukaṭamai paṭṭiteṇṭam kuṟṟateṇṭam taṟikaṭamai māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai cāraṭai Oḻukkuniṟpāṭṭam kalāyam tirikaiāyam Āṭi kāttikaipaccai karuvipaṇam Ācupotumakkaḷperkaṭamai kāṇiāṭcipeṟu Aracupeṟu talaiārikkam kāvaṟkāṟarperil koḷḷum poṉvari paccaipaṇam Aricikāṇam naṟpacu nalerutu nalerumai naṟkiṭā Eṭuttaḷavu viruttupaṭi karaṇikkarcoṭi Avasa ravattiṉai Irāyasa vattaṉai Uṭpaṭṭa palavarikaḷum Uṭpaṭa cuṅka Upaiyamāṟkam Iṭaittuṟai ṉiṅkalāka neti nikṣepam cela pāṣāṇam Akṣaṇi Akāmi si tta sādhya yam Eṉkiṟa Aṣṭa pokam tecasāsa ṉaṅkaḷ Uṭpaṭṭa sa kala svarṇṇā
tāyaṅkaḷ sa kala bhadhdhā tāyaṅkaḷ Uṭpaṭa Inta Ūrkaḷ tirunāmattukāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Āvattukkāttaruḷiya nayināṟkum tukkātevikkum Aṅkaraṅkapokam Amutupaṭi tirinuntāviḷakkum tirunāḷum tāḻpaṭāmal de varāyamahāraāyar tarmma māka sarvva mānnvya māka sarvva vātai parihāramāka cūca ntiṟārkhkhastā yiyāka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum . Inta tarmma ttukku hāni paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ kaṅkaikaraiyiṟ kapilaipacuvaiyum ma haāprāma ṇaraiyum koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavanākavum vittarmmam . Ivai panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 8.349 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
